claims.headline: Faster tendon recovery
claims.notesSentence: BPC-157 promoted tendon outgrowth, cell migration, and survival in injured Achilles tendons in a controlled rat model.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: BPC-157 tendon healing study on PubMed

claims.headline: Soothes the gut lining
claims.notesSentence: Repeated preclinical studies show BPC-157 protects the gastrointestinal mucosa and accelerates healing of ulcers and inflammatory bowel injury.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: BPC-157 IBD and gut healing review on PubMed

claims.headline: Heals strained joints
claims.notesSentence: Improved healing of transected medial collateral ligaments with faster functional recovery versus controls in a rat injury model.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: BPC-157 ligament healing study on PubMed

claims.headline: Speeds up healing
claims.notesSentence: Activates VEGFR2-Akt-eNOS signaling and angiogenesis pathways implicated in vascular and wound recovery.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: BPC-157 angiogenesis and NO system study on PubMed

claims.headline: Calms inflammation
claims.notesSentence: Reduces pro-inflammatory cytokines and oxidative-stress markers across multiple injury models.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: BPC-157 colitis and inflammation healing study on PubMed
